ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "plugin_name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "plugin_type" INTEGER /* Type of plugin (e.g., STORAGE ENGINE, AUTHENTICATION) */,
  "author" INTEGER /* Author of the plugin */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plugin (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library associated with the plugin */,
  "license" INTEGER /* License of the plugin (e.g., GPL) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the plugin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the plugin was installed */,
  "last_checked_for_update" TEXT /* Date when the plugin was last checked for updates */,
  "is_core_plugin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plugin is a core component of the system */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies for the plugin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_plugin_type FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_type") REFERENCES plugin_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin type */,
  "is_system_type" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plugin type is a system type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the author */,
  "is_organization" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is an organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin version */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the plugin */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the plugin version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is stable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_versions_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin update */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the update */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update was a rollback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES plugin_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_updates_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of plugin (e.g., STORAGE ENGINE, AUTHENTICATION)
Status of the plugin (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE)
Date when the plugin was installed
Date when the plugin was last checked for updates
Indicates if the plugin is a core component of the system

Indicates if the plugin type is a system type
Indicates if the author is an organization
Unique identifier for each plugin version
Release date of the plugin version
Indicates if the version is stable
Unique identifier for each plugin update
Notes or details about the update
Indicates if the update was a rollback
Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer)
Date when the user account was created
Indicates if the user account is active
